text: Beyond the known BC drop, the --batched path silently drops four more: predictors, feature_cache, input_norm, and aux-head bet stamps.

locator.quote: This means c1 AND c2 are

text: Because predictor_bundle was never passed, c1 AND c2 are predictor-less runs (gates were no-ops) — a correctness finding for their science.
Under --batched, predictors (race-outcome + direction) are silently OFF: accepted flags but train_cluster_batched never threads predictor_bundle, so obs is 2254-d with zero-filled predictor slots.
Consequence: bc-to-ppo cohorts c1 and c2 ran in a predictor-less, input-norm-less, BC-less configuration — re-interpret their gene signatures accordingly.
